title: Technology Audit Trainee Auditor
description: Technology Audit Trainee Auditor **Location:**Dublin, IE **Company:** Canada Life Group Services **Description:*** Full Time **Permanent** position * Hybrid role based in our City Centre offices **What we offer** We have embraced a hybrid working model for most of our positions, which means that you can enjoy a balanced approach of working from home for part of the week and working from the office for the remainder of the week. We offer a comprehensive benefits package including competitive salaries and bonuses, robust Learning and Development support, excellent Defined Contribution pension and comprehensive Wellbeing initiatives and support to name but a few. Further details on our benefits package can be accessed here Benefits (life\-careers.com) **Why Irish Life Internal Audit?** Irish Life Internal Audit is part of the global Great\-West LifeCo Internal Audit team of circa 170 people across Canada, UK, US and Ireland. As well as having direct responsibility for audit activity of Irish and German Operations, Irish Life Internal Audit also participate in and lead global audits, initiatives and benchmarking reviews. As part of the companies’ third line of defence, a key part of our job is to provide assurance that the organisation is progressing on the course of action charted by management and the board. We also work to alert management and the board to risks which may prevent the organisation from achieving its objectives. **Job Purpose:** The successful candidate will be responsible for participating in the effective execution of technology audits for Irish Life and Canada Life portfolios. They will work in conjunction with the management team, the Head of Technology Audit and the Chief Internal Auditor to develop and maintain annual technology audit plans that are aligned to technology business strategies. The role holder will also establish and maintain professional relationships with a wide range of stakeholders, including senior executives of technology business units across the delegated sector, demonstrating political sensitivity and organisational awareness. This position requires interaction with management at all levels across the global group. **What you will help us to achieve** * Contributing to technology audit assignments for both local and global audit teams within agreed timescales. * Assisting with the delivery of the Internal Control over Financial Reporting (ICOFR) IT testing programme, including performing testing and clearly documenting results. * Building trust and credibility with senior management within the technology business units by demonstrating a professional approach to auditing and a sound knowledge of technology governance, risk management and control. * Assisting with the delivery of the audit agenda. * Involvement in annual planning, continuous monitoring and risk assessment and scheduling technology risk based audits. * Inputting into the technology audit opinion in a manner that is consistent with Internal Audit’s standards, methodologies and processes. * Preparation of high\-quality written reports on relevant technology governance, risk management and control issues and communicating these to Management, agreeing action plans and tracking such issues for resolution with agreed timelines; * Input to delivery of local and global Audit Committee reporting; and * Contributing to the development of Internal Audit – locally and globally, being a key contributor of IA projects. **What you will need to be successful in the role** Ideally the successful candidate will have the following: * Strong work ethic, taking responsibility for the quality and timely completion of own deliverables. * Hold a position in internal/external audit or similar risk based role, in the execution of technology risk\-based assurance work. * Developing understanding of technology governance, risk management and control issues facing our business. * High level of organisational ability and is proactive in monitoring successful delivery of objectives against relevant criteria. * Strong blend of technical ability, judgement, and commercial awareness. * A relevant professional qualification or willing to attain professional qualification (e.g. CISA, ACA, CIA/CMIIA, ACCA), with other technology or cyber security certifications (e.g. Security\+, cloud fundamentals) an advantage. * Excellent written and verbal communication skills. * Ideally have experience in the use of Data Analytics. **About us** Canada Life Group is the top\-level European holding company for Great\-West Lifeco’s European insurance, reinsurance, and asset management companies, with business operations in the UK, Ireland, Germany, and the Isle of Man. European Technology sits within Canada Life Group and encompasses the technology community across all European entities \- Irish Life Group, Canada Life UK, Canada Life Europe, as well as Central Technology Services \- Europe. European Technology supports the business strategy and collaboration of technology across all European divisions. There are multiple IT units within European Technology, each with its own individual set of technology platforms. European Technology has evolved significantly and is now focused on bringing market\-leading speed, agility, cost efficiency, and risk mitigation to enable the delivery of strategies across the European businesses. To meet these challenges, a new strategy has been established, driving forward our commitment to innovation and excellence. The company reserves the right to draw up a shortlist as part of the selection process. Where Agency assistance is required the Canada Life Recruitment Team will engage directly with suppliers. Unsolicited CVs / profiles supplied to Canada Life by Recruitment Agencies will not be accepted for this role. Canada Life Group Services is proud to be an Equal Opportunities employer. We have created an environment of inclusion and growth to help people achieve their potential, to ensure they can bring their whole selves to work and to feel valued. We celebrate diversity of thought and perspective and want all of our employees to feel valued, respected and supported. We have built a culture that promotes equality and inclusion for all of our current and future employees and strive to ensure that our behaviours, processes and practices are aligned to this culture. If you require any accommodations during the recruitment process please contact lifecareers@irishlife.ie and we will be delighted to ensure you are fully supported to be your best. CLGS supports Equal Opportunity and is regulated by the Central Bank of Ireland.

title: TelLab - Experienced Marketing Executive
description: ***T.E. Laboratories (TelLab) is an Irish company that blends science and innovation to create practical solutions for everyday industries. description: **Transfer Agency Client Services Analyst \- JP Morgan \- Dublin \- 6 months contract \- PAYE \- ONSITE** We are seeking a dynamic team player with good communication skills, strong attention to detail and analytical skills to join JP Morgan as a Transfer Agency Client Services Analyst in Dublin. This is a client\-facing operations role with accountability for ensuring local Transfer Agency service requirements are delivered. Work with this wider team to ensure that the service quality that is delivered is of an excellent standard. * Support the standard of delivery through proactive client engagement and effective deliverable planning including using operational knowledge to take end to end ownership of issue resolution. * Be an active participant on key initiatives. **Key Skills and Attributes:** * A strong sense of ownership and responsibility. * Excellent client facing skills. * Comfortable with change, ambiguity, debate, conflict and informed risk taking. * Willingness to make decisions, while ensuring buy in from stakeholders. * Ability to challenge and influence stakeholders to ensure decisions are well thought out and can be executed from an operations perspective. * The successful candidate knows how to set priorities right, is flexible in managing working hours and feels comfortable in delivering the right results under time pressure and within tight deadlines * Experience in dealing with highly complex, demanding client organisations. * Strong organisational and time management skills. * Ability to interact efficiently with clients and effectively manage client expectations. * Transfer Agency experience is preferable but not required, you must be willing to gain an in depth understanding of end\-to\-end operational processes. * Strong written and verbal communication skills with complimentary presentation skills. * Team player **Position Demands** Hours are 9 am \- 5\.15PM but some flexibility may be required to meet operational needs. We are committed to creating an inclusive recruitment experience. If you require support or adjustments to the recruitment process, our Adjustment Concierge Service is here to help. Please feel free to contact us at adjustments@robertwalters.com to discuss how we can support you. *This position is being recruited on behalf of our client through our Outsourcing service line. Resource Solutions Limited, trading as Robert Walters, acts as an employment business and agency, partnering with top organizations to help them find the best talent. We welcome applications from all candidates and are committed to providing equal opportunities.*

title: UX Researcher
description: **We are looking for our future UX Researcher to join our** **P** **roduct** **team** **s** **in Dublin and our Global** **Customer Experience (CX)** **team!** **The role is offered as hybrid with 2 to 3 days per week onsite, in our Sandyford office.** As a UX Researcher on the Experience Insights (EXI) team (which is part of the larger Customer Experience team ) , you will work closely with designers, product managers and other stakeholders to create and refine digital experiences that improve the lives of our users. Using mixed\-methods research, you’ll support teams by bringing clarity to ambiguity with user insights throughout the product development process, from early\-stage discovery to launch and evaluation. The role is essential in delivering seamless and intuitive user experiences that are grounded in user needs. **What the role entails :** *Product Team Influence* * Develop research plans with clear objectives, participant screeners, moderator guides, recruiting strategies, and timelines * Share research findings with product, design, and executive teams in ways that support decisions * Provide regular project updates, including status, blockers, and open questions * Recommend appropriate research methods and tools based on stakeholder goals * Work with Product Managers to forecast and prioritize research needs *Organizational Influence:* * Join cross\-functional initiatives, representing the user voice and helping to drive continuous improvement * Build user empathy across the organization through readouts and direct feedback *UXR Influence:* * Stay current on industry trends and best practices in UX research **What you bring to the role** *Empathy and User Advocacy :* * You center users in your work. You understand their experiences, emotions, and motivations, and you make sure others understand them too. You use interviews, surveys, and usability tests to uncover what matters most. *Analytical Thinking :* * You are confident in both qualitative and quantitative methods and know when to use each. You turn findings into clear, actionable insights that guide decisions. *Communication and Collaboration* * You present insights in a clear and engaging way. You work closely with cross\-functional teams to make sure research findings lead to meaningful improvements. *Technical Proficiency* * You know how to select and use research tools to manage studies, analyze data, and communicate results. You apply these tools effectively in your day\-to\-day work. *Creativity* * You try new approaches when needed and adapt your communication for different audiences. You help your team explore fresh ways to apply research in their work. **Qualifications and Experience :** *Required:* * 3\-5 years of UX research experience, ideally in health tech or regulated industries * Comfortable conducting research in a fast\-paced, cross\-functional environment * Portfolio that shows past research work and deliverables * Experience with tools such as UserZoom, UserTesting, Qualtrics, Confluence, and Miro or Whiteboard * Strong communication and collaboration skills * Comfortable using AI tools as part of the research workflow * Degree in Human\-Computer Interaction, Psychology, Anthropology, or a related field * Willingness and ability to travel internationally *Preferred:* * Experience working in healthcare or medical devices * Experience conducting research on hardware/physical products **Additional information :** * At Resmed, all employees benefit from a bonus plan, the percentage of which depends on your position within the organisation. * Competitive benefits * Working from home flexibility * You also have access to a referral bonus and to Resmed's preferred shareholding programme * Internal career opportunity \- joining an international fast\-pace and massively growing company **OK, so what's next?** Joining us is more than saying “yes” to making the world a healthier place. It’s discovering a career that’s challenging, supportive and inspiring. Where a culture driven by excellence helps you not only meet your goals, but also create new ones. We focus on creating a diverse and inclusive culture, encouraging individual expression in the workplace and thrive on the innovative ideas this generates. If this sounds like the workplace for you, apply now! \#LI\-EU Joining us is more than saying “yes” to making the world a healthier place. It’s discovering a career that’s challenging, supportive and inspiring. Where a culture driven by excellence helps you not only meet your goals, but also create new ones. We focus on creating a diverse and inclusive culture, encouraging individual expression in the workplace and thrive on the innovative ideas this generates. If this sounds like the workplace for you, apply now! We commit to respond to every applicant.

This is an excellent opportunity for a mechanically qualified professional who enjoys working in a high‑reliability environment and wants to develop deep expertise across utility and energy systems. 🛠 **The Role** As a Mechanical Shift Technician, you will be trained across a wide range of plant processes and asset types, including predictive maintenance, reliability engineering and CMMS systems. You will play a critical role in ensuring continuity, safety and performance of site utilities ✅ **Key Responsibilities** * Coordinate day\-to\-day mechanical activities across shifts, including shift handovers * Act as the key point of contact for specialist service providers * Troubleshoot complex mechanical faults and carry out root cause analysis * Perform planned preventative, predictive and corrective maintenance * Develop PM schedules, job plans and SOPs for plant equipment * Support compliance, quality and safety investigations for plant deviations * Provide technical leadership and mentoring to other technicians * Support engineers with major outages, isolations, RCA and capital projects * Identify and implement continuous improvement initiatives ⚙️ **Systems \& Equipment Exposure** * Fuel oil storage and distribution * Industrial gas installations * Gas and steam turbines * Diesel generators * Boilers, compressors and pumps 🧠 **Candidate Profile** * Craft\-qualified in a mechanical discipline (essential) * Previous experience in energy conversion, utilities or industrial environments * Strong fault\-finding and analytical skills * Lean / Six Sigma experience beneficial 🎁 What’s On Offer * Permanent role with long\-term stability * Excellent benefits package including healthcare, pension and education support * High\-spec technical environment with strong learning and development opportunities

title: Veterinary Practitioner - Small Animal
description: **Veterinary Practitioner – Small Animal** ------------------------------------------ ***Raheny Veterinary Hospital, Co. Dublin*** ***Full\-time or Part\-time \\u007C Permanent*** ***Salary up to €55,000 DOE*** ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **A Role Where You Can Truly Enjoy Practice Again** --------------------------------------------------- If you’re looking for a role where you can focus on delivering high\-quality clinical care, work with a genuinely supportive team, and enjoy a varied caseload without out\-of\-hours demands \- this could be the perfect fit. Raheny Veterinary Hospital is a long\-established, community\-focused practice with a strong reputation, now entering an exciting new phase with a full refurbishment of our facilities. This is a great opportunity to join a practice that blends clinical standards, continuity of care, and a positive working environment. **The Role** ------------ This position offers a balanced mix of consulting, surgery, and case management within a busy first opinion clinic. You’ll work across a varied caseload, with time and support to thoroughly work up cases and deliver excellent patient outcomes. Your week will include a combination of consultation and surgical days, typically between 9:00am and 5:00pm, with some longer shifts incorporated into the rota. Protected time is built into the diary for admin, case follow\-ups, and clinical discussions, allowing you to manage your workload effectively. There is no out\-of\-hours or on\-call requirement, and weekend work is shared fairly across the team. **Clinical Environment \& Facilities** -------------------------------------- We are a well\-equipped and progressive practice, currently undergoing a full renovation to further enhance both our clinical capabilities and working environment. Our facilities include diagnostic imaging, ultrasound, dental X\-ray, endoscopy, and a full IDEXX in\-house laboratory. With dedicated surgical and dental suites and separate wards, we’re set up to deliver a high standard of care across both routine and more complex cases. We actively encourage thorough case work\-ups, continuity of care, and the development of individual clinical interests, particularly in surgery and diagnostics. **Team \& Culture** ------------------- What truly sets Raheny apart is our team. We are friendly, collaborative, and supportive, with a strong emphasis on communication and teamwork. You’ll be joining a team that values high clinical standards while also recognising the importance of a positive and sustainable working environment \- where people support each other and enjoy coming to work. **Who We’re Looking For** ------------------------- We’re seeking an experienced, VCI registered veterinary surgeon who is confident managing a varied caseload and enjoys both medical and surgical work. You’ll be a strong communicator, a team player, and someone who thrives in a collaborative setting. An interest in surgery or a particular clinical area would be a bonus, but most importantly, you’ll bring a positive attitude and commitment to excellent patient and client care. Please note: this role is not suitable for new graduates or those requiring close day\-to\-day mentorship. **Flexibility That Works for You** ---------------------------------- We are ideally looking for a full\-time vet working a 4\-day week, but we are open to discussing part\-time or flexible options for the right candidate. We aim to accommodate individual preferences where possible, balanced with the needs of the clinic. **Comprehensive Benefits Package (subject to pro\-rata)** --------------------------------------------------------- We believe in investing in our people. In addition to a competitive salary and a long\-term, stable role, you’ll benefit from: ### **Work Life Balance \& Employee Wellbeing** 6\.4 weeks annual leave, inclusive on bank holidays Additional holiday entitlement for your birthday Paid maternity, paternity, and adoptive leave packages Cycle to Work Scheme Company Sick Pay \& Bereavement Leave Access to EAP \& Wellbeing Centre ### **Career Development** €1300 annual CPD allowance with 40 hours paid CPD leave Full funding for any Certificates / Diplomas / PhD’s you may want to pursue Opportunities for clinical and leadership progression VCI and VDS memberships fully covered Dedicated CARE fund \- €1,100 annually to support exceptional cases ### **Additional Benefits** Annual Pay Reviews Employer Pension Contributions Discounted Veterinary Fees across the IVC Evidensia network Free Flu Vaccinations Access to “Pawesome” Benefits – retail and lifestyle discount platform Opportunity to join company programmes (LGBTQ\+, Wellbeing Champions, Nurses Committee, Clinical Board and many more) **Join a Practice That Invests in You** --------------------------------------- At Raheny Veterinary Hospital, you’ll be part of a team that genuinely cares — about patients, clients, and each other. With exciting improvements underway and a supportive culture already in place, this is a great opportunity to build a rewarding and sustainable career. If you’re ready to enjoy your work, grow your skills, and be part of a team that has your back — we’d love to hear from you. Up to €55,000 DOE We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Vice President, Accounting
description: Vice President, Accounting At BNY, our culture allows us to run our company better and enables employees’ growth and success. As a leading global financial services company at the heart of the global financial system, we influence nearly 20% of the world’s investible assets. Every day, our teams harness cutting\-edge AI and breakthrough technologies to collaborate with clients, driving transformative solutions that redefine industries and uplift communities worldwide. Recognized as a top destination for innovators, BNY is where bold ideas meet advanced technology and exceptional talent. Together, we power the future of finance – and this is what \#LifeAtBNY is all about. Join us and be part of something extraordinary. We’re seeking a future team member for the role of Vice President, Accounting to join our Finance/Accounting team. This role is located in Dublin, Ireland. In this role, you’ll make an impact in the following ways: * Lead the preparation and review of financial statements, ensuring accuracy and compliance with relevant accounting standards by demonstrating expertise in the field. * Develop and implement accounting procedures to enhance operational efficiency and ensure robust internal controls. * Provide insightful financial analysis and reporting to support strategic decision\-making and business planning initiatives. * Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to align accounting practices with organizational objectives and regulatory requirements. * Mentor and guide junior team members, fostering a culture of continuous learning and professional development. * Stay abreast of industry trends and regulatory changes to ensure compliance and inform strategic planning. At BNY, we are focused on developing AI capabilities across the firm in a responsible and controlled manner. The successful candidate will have opportunities to enhance their AI skills and apply them in support of Finance transformation * To be successful in this role, we’re seeking the following: * Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field. * ACA, ACCA, CMA or equivalent professional certification preferred. * Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with the ability to interpret complex financial data. * Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to build strategic relationships and effectively collaborate with cross\-functional teams. Leadership skills with a focus on mentoring and developing team members. * At BNY, our culture speaks for itself, check out the latest BNY news at: BNY Newsroom BNY LinkedIn Here’s a few of our recent awards: America’s Most Innovative Companies, Fortune, 2025 World’s Most Admired Companies, Fortune 2025 “Most Just Companies”, Just Capital and CNBC, 2025 Our Benefits and Rewards: BNY offers highly competitive compensation, benefits, and wellbeing programs rooted in a strong culture of excellence and our pay\-for\-performance philosophy. We provide access to flexible global resources and tools for your life’s journey. Focus on your health, foster your personal resilience, and reach your financial goals as a valued member of our team, along with generous paid leaves, including paid volunteer time, that can support you and your family through moments that matter. BNY is an Equal Employment Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer \- Underrepresented racial and ethnic groups/Females/Individuals with Disabilities/Protected Veterans.

title: Volunteer Online as a Conversation Partner
description: ENGin pairs English\-fluent volunteers from around the world with Ukrainian learners for weekly online conversation practice Participants are matched 1\-on\-1 based on preferences, interests, and availability to ensure an effective and mutually enjoyable communication experience. After a match is made, ENGin supports learners and volunteers throughout their participation in the program with tips, resources, and problem resolution. We screen every learner and volunteer to ensure their fit for the program, and provide training and orientation. Since launching in 2020, ENGin has connected over 26,000 Ukrainians with over 24,000 volunteers. 99% of our learners report breaking the language barrier after 3 months of participation in our program. Want to learn more about volunteering with ENGin? Register to attend one of our weekly Zoom info sessions https //calendly.com/volunteer\-training/volunteer\-info\-sessions You can learn more about ENGin at www.enginprogram.org/volunteer . If you have any questions before signing up, please contact us at info@enginprogram.org. , **Ready to change a life from the comfort of home?** Join ENGin as a conversation partner and be matched with a learner in Ukraine for weekly one\-on\-one English conversations. In just one hour a week, you can help someone build confidence, break the language barrier, and feel supported, all while discovering a new culture and making a genuine human connection. We’ll pair you up with a learner in Ukraine for weekly one hour videochats at times that are convenient for you. During your conversations, you’ll facilitate English practice for your partner, learn about each other’s cultures, and offer an empathetic, authentic space for connection. Our only requirements for volunteers are English fluency, a strong internet connection, and the ability to commit to **one hour a week** for a minimum of 12 weeks. No prior tutoring experience or knowledge of Ukrainian language is needed to volunteer with ENGin. We offer ample training resources, session materials, and total flexibility to customize your sessions to fit your/your partner’s goals and preferences. Our friendly team is available to support you throughout your time with us. Since our launch in 2020, ENGin has matched over 30,000 volunteers with Ukrainians for authentic English\-language connection across borders, and we continue to grow every day. 99% of our learners report feeling they were able to break the language barrier as a participant in our program, and 79% of our participants form lasting friendships. We're incredibly proud of these results, and we can't wait to welcome you into this global community of volunteers making them possible. **Here's What Three ENGin Volunteers Say About Their Experience.** * "I made a friend in Ukraine and we are teaching each other about our culture, our language, and our humor. We're even trading dad jokes! Both of us look forward to our chats and have a hard time wrapping it up." * “Fantastic organization doing great work. So happy to be a small part of it. My partner and I have worked together for two years and have become good friends! Her English has become better, and I have become more knowledgeable about Ukraine!” * "This program has been, I think, life\-changing for both of us. I really consider her more like my daughter right now. That's how close we have become!" **Ready to Get Started?** To learn more about ENGin and become a volunteer, please visit **www.enginprogram.org/volunteer** . **Still curious what volunteering with ENGin looks like?** Watch our short Introduction to Volunteering video to learn more about ENGin and the role of Conversation Partners. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact our team at info@enginprogram.org.

title: Wastewater Modellers - Dublin, Belfast, Cork
description: At Jacobs, we're challenging today to reinvent tomorrow by solving the world's most critical problems for thriving cities, resilient environments, mission\-critical outcomes, operational advancement, scientific discovery and cutting\-edge manufacturing, turning abstract ideas into realities that transform the world for good. title: Workforce Management Specialist (Monetisation Integrity Ops)
description: Global Operations Workforce Management Specialist (Monetisation Integrity Ops) Location : Dublin Employment Type : Regular Job Code : A86858A Responsibilities About the team The MI Workforce Management (WFM) team is essential to ensuring our operations are efficiently staffed and strategically aligned with TikTok's growth. As a key partner to Monetization Integrity Ops stakeholders, the Workforce Management Specialist is responsible for planning and optimizing workforce requirements across both in\-house and vendor sites. By collaborating closely with internal teams and leveraging data\-driven insights, you will continually drive improvements in performance, staffing models, and operational efficiency, making a significant impact on the overall success of our platform. **Responsibilities:** * Act as key workforce business partner to stakeholders, encompassing planning for all workforce requirements of MI Operations, whether in\-house or vendor sites; ensuring we have the right number of staff available at the right time. * Partner with internal teams to agree required levels of Auto\-Moderation to optimize human\-review performance for business needs. * Continually identify forecasting performance gaps and implement improvements. Own and develop OKR's that raise the bar in performance. * Coordinate with operations teams on HC requirement and cross utilisation opportunities, in the case of unexpected rises in moderation volumes or absenteeism. * Be responsible for monitoring operational performance to ensure optimum productivity and results, evaluate schedules to meet incoming volumes, and evaluate potential productivity, quality and customer\-service standards by analyzing performance statistics and financial results. * Drive continuous improvement on WFM processes/tools/systems including streamlining \& optimizing HC allocation and real\-time management. * Work as the Point of Contact to provide ad\-hoc and regular support to stakeholders * Deeply interrogate business and operational data to generate strategic, executive level insights on headcount rightsizing, economies of scale and other operations improvement initiatives. Qualifications Minimum Qualifications * 5\+ years experience in data, business and/or product analytics or WFM * Proven experience in business partnering and cross\-functional projects, with a focus on hands\-on capacity planning in a multi\-channel \& multi\-site tech or media company. * Deep understanding of operational statistics, business dynamics in a service environment, process development and driving operational results with data. * Expert skills in Excel, advanced in SQL, knowledge \& experience of different forecasting models/methods. Preferred Qualifications * Knowledge of Business Intelligence tools e.g. Tableau, Power BI. * Superb written and verbal communication skills, with an ability to craft business messaging appropriately \& concisely for different audiences. * Experience building reporting \& visualisation dashboards. * Excellent problem\-solving, task prioritisation, follow\-up, and quick learning skills; Ability to work in a fast\-paced environment with dedication, passion and motivation * Ads or content moderation experience is a plus. Job Information Trust \& Safety Content that this role interacts with includes images, video, and text related to every\-day life, but it can also include (but is not limited to) bullying; hate speech; child safety; depictions of harm to self and others, and harm to animals. Hence, it is possible that this role will be exposed to harmful content on a daily basis. ​ ​ TikTok recognises that keeping our platform safe for the TikTok communities is no ordinary job which can be both rewarding and psychologically demanding and emotionally taxing for some. This is why we are sharing the potential hazards, risks and implications in this unique line of work from the start, so our candidates are well informed before joining. ​ ​ We are committed to the wellbeing of all our employees and promise to provide comprehensive and evidence\-based programs, to promote and support physical and mental wellbeing throughout each employee's journey with us. We believe that wellbeing is a relationship and that everyone has a part to play, so we work in collaboration and consultation with our employees and across our functions in order to ensure a truly person\-centred, innovative and integrated approach. ​ About TikTok TikTok is the leading destination for short\-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo. ​ Why Join Us Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy \- a mission we work towards every day. ​ We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us. ​ ​ Diversity \& Inclusion ​ TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.
